title: verbesina arborescens
intro: Verbesina arborescens, also known as Tree Ironweed, is a perennial plant species native to the southeastern United States and Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant's roots, leaves, and flowers have been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and promoting healing. Verbesina arborescens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is also used in folk medicine as a poultice or topical application.
